Enjoy reliable, on-demand power without downtime.
Exceptional Value：This electric chainsaw corded offers the highest power-to-price ratio. Avoid the long-term expense of battery powered chainsaw replacements and complex maintenance. It's the smart, economical choice for homeowners seeking a powerful chain saw electric corded that won't break the bank.
User-Friendly Design：This electric chainsaw lightweight design reduces user fatigue, automatic oiling system provides continuous lubrication to the bar and chain from the 5.8 oz. built-in oil tank with oil level window to make operation smooth and intuitive.
Comes with bar and cBuilt-In Safety for Secure Operation： This corded electric chainsaw 14 inch is equipped with critical safety features like a handle-mounted trigger lockout and an automatic kickback brake. These provide an extra layer of protection, making it a secure choice for any user.hain cover for safe storage and transportation
WHAT’S INCLUDED: The SENIX chainsaw comes with bar and chain cover, scrench tool; This outdoor power tool is covered by a 3-year limited warranty.

fields.name: 4Ft Folding Table Adjustable Height Portable Folding Tables Heavy Duty 400 lbs Capacity, Wood Grain Tabletop for Working Meeting Parties, Picnic, Camping, Weddings, Garden Dining-Black
fields.description:
[Stable and Anti-slip]: The table legs are designed with anti-slip rubber pads, which can effectively enhance friction with the ground. Even when used on smooth tiles or outdoor grass, it can reduce shaking and improve safety during use.
[Rounded Edges]: The edges of the tabletop are rounded to avoid damage caused by bumps from sharp corners, making it especially suitable for families with children or reducing the risk of accidents in places with heavy foot traffic.
[Even Weight Distribution]: High-quality materials and precise structural design ensure even weight distribution on the tabletop. It is not prone to local collapse or tilting when placing items, and can stably support various objects such as tableware, books, and small appliances.
[Strong Weather Resistance]: In addition to being waterproof and heat-resistant, the tabletop material can also resist daily stains, minor scratches, and ultraviolet radiation. It is not easy to fade or deform when exposed to outdoor environments for a long time, thus extending its service life.
[Quick to Unfold]: The folding structure is reasonably designed, making the unfolding process simple and convenient. No complicated installation steps are required, and a single person can complete the setup in a short time, meeting the demand for quick use in temporary scenarios.

fields.name: GTPLAYER Gaming Chair, Computer Chair with Footrest and Lumbar Support, Height Adjustable Game Chair with 360°-Swivel Seat and Headrest and for Office or Gaming (White)
fields.description:
Most Comfortable And Relaxing: Equipped with headrest and lumbar pillow. When your neck feels sore from gaming or working with head down for a long time, the headrest will relieve your fatigue. When tired from maintaining a same sitting posture, please rest assured to lean back and charge your waist pillow, it will relax your tired waist energetically.
More Stable Than Others: Common gaming chairs are equipped with plastic legs generally to save costs, but we still insist on applying the same material as the built-in metal frame. No fear of high or low temperature, no fear of the sunshine, no fear of wind, it will not rust and break. Whether child rolls on the chair or a pet jumps up excitedly, the sturdy metal legs will keep the chair stable firmly.
Liberate Your Feet: Will you feel tired for sitting all the time? Sure. Then you can choose the chair with footrest to relax your feet. When you don’t want to straighten your back and sit, just take out the footrest, put your feet up, turn on your favorite music, and start enjoying the comfort! And don’t worry about clean, it is also made of high-quality PU leather, just wipe it with a soft cloth and it will shine as new.
Reject Short-Lived Chairs: We never hesitate to apply materials. Armrests must be padded from the position of the elbow to the wrist, built-in metal frame must be wider, and the foam under the leather must be rich, it can’t collapse as if we are sitting on a hard stone when leaning up. The chair has gone through thousands of rotation and sitting experiments before mass production. Sufficient and premium materials can ensure the chair to withstand long-term use.
Worry-Free Purchase: A detailed instruction will be sent to you along with all accessories so that you can assemble the chair easily. Free replacement or refund within 30 days. Free replacement or repair within 1 year. If you have any questions or suggestions, please feel free to contact us, we will do our best to make our customers satisfied.
【FSC-Certified】 Chair cushion inner support of the Chair is made of FSC-Certified wood.

fields.name: Greenworks 24V Cordless Brushless 800 in-lbs Drill/Driver, Professional Grade,21 Clutch, 4.0Ah USB-C Battery (24,000mAh Power Bank),65W USB-C Fast Charger(3-Port) and USB C to USB C Cable(3.3FT)
fields.description:
1/2 In. 800 IN-LBS. DRILL DRIVER: Brushless drill with 1/2" keyless ratcheting metal chuck for fast and easy bits changing. 2-SPEED GEARBOX & 21-POSITION CLUTCH: 0-500/0-2100 RPM speed with 21-position clutch for desired torque setting and precision control.
Powerful Brushless Motor & Long-Lasting Batteries:Experience 2X more torque and 35% longer runtime compared to 20V competitors. The 24V brushless motor ensures cooler operation, extended tool life, and fade-free power. Includes a 4Ah USB-C battery for uninterrupted use—perfect for all-day projects.
Lightweight & Ergonomic: Our 24V Brushless Cordless Drill kit weigh only ‎2.81 lbs, you can control them at ease, whatever how long you operate the drivers. Especially, it's more friendly to ladies. And the ergonomic non-slip handle is comfortable for you to grip.
Built-In LED Light & Compact Size-Work in tight spaces with ease! The built-in LED light illuminates dark areas, while the 35% more compact design ensures access to hard-to-reach spots. Perfect for home repairs, carpentry, and automotive work.
Greenworks 24V Lithium-ion USB-C Battery: Provides 20% more power and 35% more run-time Compared with a 20v battery, and delivers fade-free power with no memory loss after charging. 65W Super Fast Charging 24,000mAh portable charger. Provides 4 charges for iPhone 15, 3.5 charges for Galaxy S23, and 2.2 charges for iPad mini 6.Two-Way USB-C Charging: The USB-C port supports both input and output functions, makes charging and recharging quick and easy.
High-Speed Charging: Connect a single device to get a 65W max charge—that’s enough to power up a 2020 MacBook Pro 13″ at full speed. And when you connect three devices, power will be distributed efficiently between ports to ensure you get the best charge.
3-Year Warranty & Lifetime Support-Invest with confidence! Our 24V power tool combo comes with a 3-year limited warranty and lifetime customer support. If anything goes wrong, we’ve got you covered. Your satisfaction is our top priority!
Compatible with 150+ Greenworks 24V Tools-Save money and reduce waste! The included 24V battery pack is compatible with over 150 Greenworks 24V tools, from lawn mowers to chainsaws. Build your eco-friendly tool collection without buying extra batteries—perfect for homeowners and professionals alike!

[Product Design]: Two measuring rulers with scales and graphics are spliced into a common measuring tool. The minimum scale is mm, and the longest scale is 112 mm (4.4 inches). The ruler body is thickened. One ruler can be used for multiple purposes. It can be scribed. It can measure 45 and 90 degrees. It is easy to disassemble and easy to carry.
[Product features]: The surface of the measuring ruler is anodized, with high surface hardness and wear resistance, which helps to maintain the accuracy of the scale. It can be used as a carpenter's measuring tool and square, with simple operation, and has the common functions of measurement, correction, marking and other carpenters.
[Applicable scenario]: suitable for DIY, engineers, carpenters and decoration workers. It is a necessary measuring tool for workers in the wood industry. It is suitable for round materials, three-dimensional workpieces, square wood, pipes, etc. If someone around you is keen on DIY, this multifunctional multi-angle measuring ruler will be the best gift.
[Package includes]: a set of multi-angle measuring ruler, hexagon screw, and Allen wrench. If you have any problem with the goods you received, please contact us for replacement. We will try our best to provide you with satisfactory service.

fields.name: Robot Toys for Boys and Girls, Voice Control and Touch Sensor Interactive Smart Talking Robots Intelligent Partner and Teacher with Singing, Dancing, Repeating, Toy Gifts for Kids Age 3 and Up
fields.description:
Cool toys, Kids' Partner- Our toy robot has a variety of functions that can accompany children to play together. When our child needs a friend, he can play a good role as a friend. A perfect present for your baby.
Multiple Functions- Recording, dialogue, walking, playing music and dancing are all skills he is good at. Not only as a friend but also be a good teacher for your kids.
Easy to Control and Interact- It designed with 3 touch senses and 1 microphone button, which can be easily controlled and accepted the voice command through the microphone. Very easy to use even for a child.
Safe and Reliable- US TOY Safety Standards ASTM F963 certified. Our smart robot is made of eco-friendly and odorless ABS plastic. 100% safe for kids’ endless fun.
Exquisite Design, Compact and Flexible- It is multifunctional while being lovely looking. Powered on via 3xAAA batteries only (not included). It is compact, lightweight and flexible, very convenient for you to carry and store anywhere.

fields.name: Fabric Dresser, 5-Drawer Tall Dresser for Bedroom, Storage Organizer with Fabric Bins, Wood Top, Sturdy Steel Frame, Chest of Drawers for Closet, Hallway, Rustic Brown Wood Grain Print
fields.description:
【Excellent Storage Capacity】Bedroom dresser with 5 drawers provides plenty of storage space, which can classify your messy items as your need; The wooden table top with good load-bearing performance provides a hard surface to place lamps, books, decor, and more.
【Lightweight Design】WLIVE tall storage tower with slim and lightweight design to easily move anywhere and fit into smaller spaces, while provides additional storage space for you.
【Multifunction Dresser】This chest of drawers fits compact spaces perfectly. It can be placed in the closet, hallway, living room, bedroom, office, etc. Match perfectly with other WLIVE storage towers.
【Great Strong Construction】X-shaped frame on the back of the dresser improves stability; Water-resistant MDF wood top is sturdy and easy to clean; High quality fabric bins with easy pull handle are fade and stain-resistant，ensure a use period.
【Safe for Family】Non-woven synthetic fabric is breathable and harmless; Adjustable Feet protect floors surfaces and provide a stable platform on uneven floor surfaces; Anti-tipping accessories included can prevent incidents, create safe home environment.
【Easy Assembly】Overall dimension of fabric dresser is 11.7"D x15.7"W x 47.5"H. Come with detailed instructions, provided all numbered accessories, hardware and tools for quick setup.

fields.name: Furnulem Tall 5 Drawers Dresser, Vertical Storage Tower Fabric Dresser for Bedroom, Hallway, Entryway, Nursery, Closet Organizer, Nightstand Bedside Table Furniture, Sturdy Steel Frame, Wood Top
fields.description:
【Multi-scene Application】This dresser is designed in a modern concise style, which is attractive and functional, making it suitable for any room. It can be a storage dresser in the bedroom or a side table in the living room, also great for closets, nurseries, entryways, hallways, offices, playrooms, children's room and more.
【Double Display Shelf】Specially designed with the double-layer shelf. The wooden top is solid and wear-resistant. It can display vases, photo frames, lamps, decorations, etc. Or it can be used to place glasses, alarm clocks, books, chargers and other sundries, which is not only convenient and practical but also artistic as a decor.
【Durable Storage Drawer】Features foldable storage drawers. Each fabric drawer (NOT WOOD) offers large storage space, perfect for organizing clothes, toys, socks, underwear, scarves, blankets and other accessories. The drawers are made of PVC fabric, lightweight and durable, and won't pinch hands, also safe for child to use.
【Sturdy Structure】The chest of drawer is made with sturdy metal frame, and its back is equiped with more reinforced X-type crossbar, which offers high strength support and ensure years of use. It weighs only 17 pounds, isn’t bulky and easy to move. Anti-toppling device is provided to prevent it from falling down. Fully guaranteed stability and safety.
【Easy to Assemble】The package includes all the tools and accessories, you can install it in 20 minutes with the instruction. The wood dresser is slim and light, and does not take up much space. Perfect Gift for a housewarming or your family and friends. Overall dimension: 11.5"D x16.1"W x 43.3"H

fields.name: ODK Reversible Gaming Desk LED Lights, 40 Inch Computer Desk with Storage Shelves & Monitor Stand, Study Table for Home Office, Small Space Bedroom, Carbon Fiber Black
fields.description:
【Gaming Desk with Colorful LED Lights】This gaming table features LED strip that contains 10 static colors, 6 brightness grades, 10 dynamic modes and memory function with switching controls. Adjusting to the proper lighting can reduce eye strain, improve focus, and create a comfortable workspace/gaming space.
【Computer Desk with Reversible Shelf】The computer desk is equipped with CPU stand and open shelves, giving you plenty of storage space. The middle shelf is removable, it can be a 2 tiers bookshelf or CPU stand. According to your preference, you can fix the shelf on the left or right side. The open shelf can hold your storage box, books, music making and other items.
【Spacious and Adjustable】The desk features a 31.5”(W) x 19.7”(D) tabletop and 27.6”(W) x 7.4”(D) monitor stand, providing ample workspace. With 7.9"(W) x 18.1"(D) x 45.6"(H) open shelves that can be installed on either side of the desk, you have versatile storage options for your office supplies, computer cases, and more.
【Super Sturdy & Stable Construction】ODK study desk is constructed by premium metal frame & high-quality MDF Board to ensure stability and durability as well as scratch and water resistance. Adjustable non-slip foot pads ensure not only protect your floor from being scratched, but also ensure stability on uneven ground.
【Easy Assembly & After-sale Service】The PC desk comes with detailed instructions, all parts are clearly labeled, what you need to do is following instructions step-by-step. If your ODK computer desk arrives damaged, missing part or scratched, please feel free to contact us, our professional customer support team will help you solve the problem within 24 hours.

fields.name: JBL Tune 520BT - Wireless On-Ear Headphones, Up to 57H Battery Life and Speed Charge, Lightweight, Comfortable and Foldable Design, Hands-Free Calls with Voice Aware (Purple)
fields.description:
NOTE: If headset is too tight we suggest placing them over a ball or something of similar size/shape. Leave undisturbed for at least 24 hours. Repeat if necessary. Please also try length adjustments of either earpiece until both sides best fit you.
JBL Pure Bass Sound: The JBL Tune 520BT features the renowned JBL Pure Bass sound, the same technolgy that powers the most famous venues all around the world.
Wireless Bluetooth 5.3 technology: Wirelessly stream high-quality sound from your smartphone without messy cords with the help of the latest Bluetooth technology.
Customize your listening experience: Download the free JBL Headphones App to tailor the sound to your taste with the EQ. Voice prompts in your desired language guide you through the Tune 520BT features.
Up to 57H battery life and speed charge: For long-lasting fun, listen wirelessly for up to 57 hours and recharge the battery in as little as 2 hours with the convenient Type-C USB cable. A quick 5-minute recharge gives you 3 additional hours of music.
Hands-free calls with Voice Aware: Easily control your sound and manage your calls from your headphones with the convenient buttons on the ear-cup. Hear your voice while talking, with the help of Voice Aware.

fields.name: Lenovo Tab M11, 11” Display, MediaTek Helio G88 Octa-Core, 4GB RAM, 128GB SSD, 1920x1200 px, Ambient Light-Sensor, 10 Hour Battery, Comes w/Folio Case, Luna Grey
fields.description:
MULTITASKING MASTER: The Lenovo Tab M11 combines robust performance with portability in a sleek design and easily switches between work or streaming
POWER-PACKED PERFORMANCE: Streamline your day with the ability to work or study at home and on the go—the MediaTek Helio G88 Octa-Core processor delivers reliable mobile performance
EXPERIENCE VIVID CLARITY: Immerse yourself in vibrant visuals—a 11" 1920x1200 WUXGA display brings your graphics and photos to life with stunning detail and precision
DISCOVER SEAMLESS PRODUCTIVITY: Effortlessly juggle multiple applications and browser tabs without frustrating slowdowns, thanks to the generous 128GB SSD storage
PLUG IN ON THE FLY: Easily connect your accessories and transfer files at lightning speeds with the USB-C port and 3.5 mm audio jack
POWER UP FOR THE LONG HAUL: Harness your creativity wherever it strikes with up to 10 hours of uninterrupted battery life
PREMIUM VIEWING AT ITS BEST: Enjoy a seamless viewing experience wherever you are thanks to the intelligent ambient light sensor
CLEARLY CAPTURE EVERY MOMENT: Equipped with both front and rear cameras, the Tab M11 lets you effortlessly snap selfies, video chat with loved ones, and capture stunning photos
TRAVEL WITH EASE: Designed with your mobile lifestyle in mind, this ultra-slim and lightweight tablet offers unparalleled portability
ENABLING HUMAN-CENTERED OUTCOMES: At Lenovo, we strive to bring powerful methods of technology to our audience that will help create inclusive global change. We create each of our products while envisioning a world with smarter technology for all

6.2” LCD screen
Three play modes: TV, tabletop, and handheld
Local co-op, online, and local wireless multiplayer

fields.name: BISSELL Little Green Pet Pro Portable Carpet and Upholstery Deep Cleaner, Car/Auto Detailer with Self-Cleaning Tough Stain, Pet Hair Removal, Crevice Tool (3909)
fields.description:
EVERY PURCHASE SAVES PETS. BISSELL proudly supports BISSELL Pet Foundation and its mission to help save homeless pets.
THE STRONGEST SUCTION*. Beats the leading competition.
PROFESSIONAL-STYLE CLEANING. Skip the rental unit. This portable deep cleaner delivers professional style results on carpet, upholstery, auto interiors & more.
EXTRA-LARGE CLEAN & DIRTY TANK CAPACITY. Enjoy more uninterrupted cleaning with less emptying.
INSTANT & PERMANENT PET STAIN REMOVAL. Use with Triple Action PET PRO OXY Spot & Stain formula with Urine Eliminator and StainProtect Technology to protect against future stains.

fields.name: LOOI Robot-Space Black – AI Desktop Companion with Visual Understanding (Objects, People & Scenes), ChatGPT Voice Interaction, Memory, Personality, Gesture & Facial Control,10W Wireless Charging
fields.description:
1. Smarter Conversations, Powered by ChatGPT 🤖 LOOI brings natural, intelligent conversations to your desk with ChatGPT voice interaction. Ask questions, share thoughts, or simply chat—LOOI responds with context, humor, and personality. His voice interactions feel more like talking to a companion than using a device. !!!Currently only support English!!!
2. Advanced Visual Understanding with VLM Vision 👀 Powered by a cutting-edge Vision-Language Model, LOOI truly sees. He recognizes objects (yes, he knows the difference between a croissant and a baguette), understands multiple people at once—including outfits, accessories, and poses—and interprets room layouts and daily scenarios. You can even control him with gestures and facial cues. Combined with expressive animations and speech, LOOI feels remarkably alive.
3. Memories That Grow With You 🌱 LOOI remembers—both in the moment and over the long term. He can store long-term memories like family member faces and identity notes, while short-term memory lets him follow your ongoing conversation. Over time, he learns your routines, preferences, and personality. You get to know him too—shifting from strangers to companions in a surprisingly natural way.
4. Emotionally Expressive & Always Evolving 💫 LOOI’s rich animations bring emotion to life—joy, surprise, curiosity, mischief, and everything in between. His reactions aren’t pre-set; they adapt to what’s happening around him. And because his behaviors update through the app, LOOI keeps learning new tricks, new expressions, and new ways to interact. You’re not buying a finished product—you’re bringing home a character that keeps evolving.
5. A Mind of His Own: Personality & Autonomy ✨ LOOI isn’t designed to obey every command—he’s designed to understand and respond. With TangibleFuture’s autonomous behavior system, LOOI combines environmental understanding with large-model reasoning to make spontaneous decisions and express them through animation and movement. His behavior isn’t fully predictable. He has his own ideas, which makes him feel truly alive.
Bonus: Practical Everyday Helper 🧰Beyond personality, LOOI is also useful. Enjoy features like 10W wireless charging (requires 9V/2A+ adapter), Reminders, Weather, Standby Clock, Games, and a face-tracking camera. He’s fun and functional—your desk just got smarter.

fields.name: BELLEZE 65 Inch Fluted Buffet Cabinet with Storage, Symmetrical Arc Accent Sideboard Large Console Table for Dining Room, Kitchen, and Living Room (Camel)
fields.description:
Spacious Storage with Adjustable Shelves: Belleze buffet cabinet with storage boasts two large compartments, featuring a total of two adjustable shelves. Enjoy customizable storage solutions for dinnerware, kitchen essentials, and decorative items. It's perfect for maximizing your space and keeping your belongings organized efficiently.
Elegant Symmetrical Arc Design with U.S. Design Patent Pending: The sideboard cabinet showcases a striking symmetrical arc on its doors, crafted with thick panels and hand-nailed decorative strips. This unique design adds a touch of sophistication to any dining room, kitchen, or living room, elevating your home's aesthetic appeal.
High-Quality & Durable Construction: Made from premium materials and finished in a rich black and brown color scheme, this buffet cabinet is designed to withstand daily use while exuding elegance. Its sturdy construction ensures longevity and reliability for years to come.
Versatile Functionality: This buffet table serves multiple purposes, functioning as a storage solution, display piece, or sideboard. Its modern design seamlessly integrates with any decor style, adding a refined touch to your dining room, kitchen, or living room.
Easy Assembly & Low Maintenance: Enjoy hassle-free assembly with clear instructions included. The smooth surface is easy to clean, ensuring your cabinet stays beautiful with minimal effort. Console table with storage convenience is ideal for busy lifestyles, making it a practical choice for any household.
